# CWE-523 negative: login only after TLS redirect middleware (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-523-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func requireTLS(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if r.TLS == nil {
			target := "https://" + r.Host + r.URL.String()
			http.Redirect(w, r, target, http.StatusMovedPermanently)
			return
		}
		next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
	})
}

func StartCleartextLogin(db *sql.DB) *http.Server {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	mux.Handle("/login", requireTLS(http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		_ = r.ParseForm()
		user := r.FormValue("username")
		pass := r.FormValue("password")
		_ = db.QueryRow("SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ? AND password_hash = ?", user, pass)
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	})))
	return &http.Server{Addr: ":8443", Handler: mux}
}
